creator: artur@ybka.com
text:
Hi,
   in emails with "security run output" on my server (it is going to be production machine) I see many disturbing messages:

+amr0: Too many retries on command 0xc7483ad8.  Controller is likely dead

Below is dmesg.boot file content:
